Withington · Coffee · Brunch · Charcoal Grill

Fired over charcoal,
made for Withington.

Fresh coffee, all-day brunch and proper charcoal-grilled favourites — 100% halal, in the heart of Withington. Newly opened and already the talk of Wilmslow Road.

Welcome to Izzy's

Where the coffee's warm and the grill's always on.

Izzy's is Withington's new home for slow mornings and smoky evenings — a proper neighbourhood cafe by day, a charcoal grill by night. Everything's halal, everything's made fresh, and everyone's welcome. Pull up a chair.
